mapper.sql: SELECT id, name, country, province, city, area, area_detail, telephone, postal_code, email, create_time FROM lib_publish WHERE is_deleted = 0

when.test: queryParams.field != null and queryParams.field != '' and queryParams.keyword != null and queryParams.keyword != ''

choose.when: AND ( province LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryParams.keyword},'%') OR city LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryParams.keyword},'%') OR area LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryParams.keyword},'%') OR area_detail LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryParams.keyword},'%') )
